notes:
The magicolor 4690MF is a network color all-in-one printer/scanner. The printer *only* is supported by the foo2lava open software printer driver.

Consumables: Separate toner cartridges black (4500 prints, ~$79), yellow/magenta/cyan (4500 prints, ~$119 each), drum Cartridge (45000 prints, ~$149)
